task_completion.description: Create a 2D sketch of the U-shaped base
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D sketch of a U-shape is visible in the SolveSpace canvas. Constraint dimensions for outer width (40), total length (50), and wall thickness (5) should be visible.

task_completion.description: Extrude the U-shaped sketch into a 3D bracket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The U-shape is extruded into a 3D solid. An extrusion depth of 30 should be visible in the property browser or as a constraint in the canvas.

task_completion.description: Sketch the cross-hole on the bracket arm
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circle is sketched on one of the bracket arms. Constraints showing a diameter of 10 (or radius 5), positioned 15mm from the vertical edge and 10mm from the open end should be visible.

task_completion.description: Extrude the cross-hole to cut through both arms
task_completion.visual_evidence: The circular sketch is extruded as a boolean difference (cut), creating a hole that passes completely through both arms of the U-bracket.

task_completion.description: Save the project as a SolveSpace file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title bar displays 'clevis_bracket.slvs', or a save dialog shows the file being saved to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/clevis_bracket.slvs.

task_completion.description: Export the 3D model as an STL file
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog or file manager shows 'clevis_bracket.stl' being created or existing in /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to model the bracket
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the SolveSpace graphical user interface, including drawing tools and the property browser.

integrity.description: The model was built using genuine sketch and extrude operations
integrity.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace property browser (usually on the left) shows a history of groups such as 'Sketch in 3d' and 'Extrude', confirming the model was built step-by-step.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run scripts that automatically generate the SLVS or STL files without GUI interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final 3D model should be a U-shaped bracket with a bounding box of [30.0, 40.0, 50.0] mm. The expected volume is approximately 18715 mm^3 (initial U-shape volume is 19500 mm^3, minus the cross-hole volume of ~785.4 mm^3). The files must be saved exactly as /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/clevis_bracket.slvs and /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/clevis_bracket.stl.
